title: Torrential rains in northern Kanto cause landslides and collapses with fatalities
summary: Heavy rainfall in the prefectures of Tochigi and Gunma triggered avalanches that destroyed several houses and left at least one person dead and several missing.

title: Seven years after the arson attack on Kyoto Animation, a memorial ceremony is held
summary: Family members and employees of the company remembered the 36 victims of the arson in 2019 and reaffirmed their commitment to the company's legacy.

title: Yokozuna Onosato remains undefeated in the Nagoya sumo tournament
summary: On the seventh day of the tournament, Yokozuna Onosato achieved his third consecutive victory, while several wrestlers like Kirishima suffered their first defeat.

title: Agreement between Shizuoka and JR Central to start construction of the linear train section
summary: The governor of Shizuoka and the railway company signed an agreement that allows the start of work on the tunnel, considered the most difficult part of the project.

title: Man arrested for abandoning the bodies of his girlfriend and her daughter in the mountains of Nara
summary: The suspect confessed that he transported the bodies in his vehicle and abandoned them in the mountain range; police are investigating the case as a possible murder.

title: Roki Sasaki throws at 164 km/h and dominates the Yankees in his best outing
summary: The Japanese pitcher allowed only one run in six innings, highlighting his powerful fastball against the powerful Yankees lineup.

title: ASEAN meetings with participation of US and Japanese foreign ministers
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Japan's Foreign Minister attend the meetings in Southeast Asia amid growing rivalry with China.

title: Tensions escalate between the United States and Iran with threats of attacks on nuclear facilities
summary: Iran warns of a total offensive if US attacks continue, while oil prices rise due to fear of a conflict in the Persian Gulf.

title: Latest World Cup news: preparations for the final and the third-place match
summary: The World Cup is nearing its conclusion with the third-place match between France and England and the grand final featuring Messi and other stars.

title: Political and commercial aspects of the World Cup generate debate
summary: The tournament is criticized for its high ticket costs, the politicization of the event, and the economic impact on host cities.

title: Bankruptcy of ZenToushin leaves millions in debts to over 30,000 businesses
summary: The electronic payments company declared bankruptcy, affecting thousands of restaurants and stores that will not recover their funds.

title: Apple increases iPhone prices in Japan by around 10%
summary: The company raised prices for the iPhone 17 series due to the depreciation of the yen and the increase in semiconductor costs.

title: Smoke on a Tokyu Toyoko line train forces suspension of service
summary: A battery on the floor of the car generated smoke, interrupting service between Shibuya and Jiyugaoka; no injuries were reported.

title: Professional baseball results: Giants waste opportunity
summary: The Yomiuri Giants had 13 hits but could not score, while the Chunichi Dragons won with pitcher Wakui.

title: Earthquake in Venezuela leaves more than 5,000 dead and massive damage
summary: A devastating earthquake in Venezuela caused thousands of fatalities, and the government plans to build temporary housing for those affected.

title: Magnitude 7.3 earthquake shakes southern Mexico with no impact on Japan
summary: A strong earthquake in the state of Chiapas generated an alert, but Japanese authorities confirmed that there is no risk of a tsunami in the country.

title: Scandal in Thailand: more than 5,900 officials fired for fraud in entrance exam
summary: Massive data manipulation was detected in the public personnel selection tests, which led to the dismissal of thousands of employees.

title: Ex-vice president of Fukuoka assembly accused of delivering 5 million yen in bribery
summary: The politician allegedly handed over an envelope of money to deputy Kurauchi, who denied it, in a corruption case that shakes the prefecture.

title: Trump administration resumes preferential treatment for Hong Kong based on 'one country, two systems'
summary: The US administration reinstates trade benefits for Hong Kong, which was positively received by China.

title: Former Japanese minister blames India for delay in high-speed train
summary: Former Justice Minister Hideki Makihara stated that the delay in the railway construction is '100% India's fault' for not complying with agreements.
